svg.text: Single API call — fully autonomous from here
LangGraph — autonomous agentic loop · no human in the loop

g.text: Generates vendor-specific CLI for current intent
Filters commands_already_run · escalates layer if empty
Retries generator if invalid · passes if valid
Connects to device_ip with stored credentials
Captures stdout per command · handles timeouts + errors
Writes device_output to state · closes connection
Writes diagnostic_intent → state.query for next turn

svg.text: WorkflowState — persisted across all 5 agents every turn

g.text: connection timeout → retry 2x → mark command as ssh_error · continue with partial output
